description_long: This is a military-style gas mask helmet, primarily olive green in color, designed to cover the entire lower face and eyes. The helmet features a prominent dual-filter system on either side of the mouth area, with circular vented covers for air filtration. The front has a ribbed, grill-like structure over the mouth and nose, and the eye area is open, likely for the addition of transparent lenses or goggles. The sides and back of the helmet show adjustable strap attachments for securing the mask to the head. The surface is matte and slightly textured, with no visible branding or decorative graphics. The overall design is utilitarian, focusing on protection and filtration in hazardous urban environments.
description: Olive green gas mask helmet with dual side filters, ribbed mouth vent, and adjustable straps. Matte, utilitarian design with no visible graphics.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open eye area, ribbed mouth vent, and large circular filters on both sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the protruding filter and the attachment points for the adjustable straps.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, contoured back of the helmet and the strap connectors.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the filter and strap attachments.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two large circular vents on each side of the mouth area, with a ribbed central vent over the mouth and nose.
